title: Instagram
content: Photo by Bilal Mahmood 馬百樂 on April 08, 2026. May be an image of standing, forklift and crane. Today I visited the PG&E substation that caught fire months ago in San Francisco and caused a citywide blackout. Touring the facility, I saw the breaker that caught fire, as well as improvements to the facility that have been made that we requested in our public hearing back in February, such as digitization of paper records and maps. We will be holding a second hearing into PG&E at the Board of Supervisors in mid May to review the completed investigation into what caused the fire itself, and improvements to protocols going forward. Photo by Bilal Mahmood 馬百樂 on June 27, 2026. May be an image of text that says 'SF City Budget Wins: Safety, Youth, and andFoodSecurity Food Security'. May be an image of text that says 'Fixing T Conflicting Housing Laws in SF MAXIMUM OCCUPANCY NOT OTTO To EXCEED PERSONS'. May be an image of standing, lighting, carpet, office and text.

title: the Google Visitor Experience
content: Welcome to the Google Visitor Experience. The Google Visitor Experience is a new destination for everyone — neighbors, visitors, and Googlers — at our Gradient Canopy office in Mountain View. Connect with friends at the cafe, attend a community event at the Huddle, explore our hardware products and services at the Google Store, support local businesses at the Pop-Up Shop, and enjoy art and events on the plaza. Learn where the Huddle, Cafe @ Mountain View, Pop-Up Shop, Google Store, and art are located at the Google Visitor Experience. Experience a taste of Google through food and beverages made with local, seasonal ingredients ### Google Store. Shop the latest products made by Google, get help from one of our experienced experts, attend a workshop, and find exclusive Google merchandise ### Art. Become inspired by interactive and imaginative artworks. Shop the latest products made by Google, get help from one of our experienced experts, attend a workshop, and find exclusive Google merchandise ### Pop-Up Shop.
